# Session Log

Save under `docs/elicitation/sessions/SES-<date>-<stakeholder>.md`.
Use for interviews, workshops, observations, document review sessions, and
surveys (one log per session).

## Metadata

- Session ID: SES-YYYY-MM-DD-XXX
- Date / time:
- Duration:
- Technique: interview | workshop | observation | document review | survey | other
- Lead BA:
- Note-taker:
- Stakeholders present:
- Stakeholders absent (and reason):
- Status: draft | review | agreed

## Source Notes (Raw Material)

Mỗi session phải reference ≥1 raw note dưới
`docs/elicitation/notes/`. Nếu chưa có note → tạo trước, rồi mới
viết session log.

| Note ID | Type | Liên quan phần nào của session |
| --- | --- | --- |
| MN-YYYY-MM-DD-... | meeting note |  |
| TR-YYYY-MM-DD-... | transcript |  |

## Objective

What were we trying to learn?

## What Actually Happened

Short narrative of how the session went, deviations from plan, energy in the
room, anything that affects interpretation of the notes.

## Raw Notes

Capture verbatim where possible. Mark BA paraphrase with `[BA:`.

```text

```

## Extracted Raw Statements

| Raw ID | Verbatim / near-verbatim | Source stakeholder | Source note | Initial classification |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| RAW-XXX |  |  | MN-... / TR-... | functional / NFR / constraint / assumption / out-of-scope / glossary / decision input |

## Follow-Up Questions

Questions you could not answer in the session.

- Q1 (owner, target session).

## Glossary Candidates

Terms heard for the first time, or terms used with a meaning that differs
from the current glossary.

- Term: definition heard.

## Decisions Made (if any)

Decisions made by stakeholders during the session. Promote to
`docs/decisions/` if scope or methodology was set.

## Post-Session Checklist

- [ ] Raw statements parked in `docs/requirements/raw/`.
- [ ] Follow-up questions tracked.
- [ ] Glossary candidates added to project glossary as draft.
- [ ] Traceability rows added.
- [ ] Log circulated to attendees for confirmation.

## History

- YYYY-MM-DD: created.
